summary: Iteration 4 — targeted frontend verification of (1) ISO 14001 REVERT (ISO 22241 rollback), (2) Header 1024px CTA clipping fix (breakpoint moved from lg to xl), (3) Footer website link www.nnpolychem.com, plus a lightweight regression sanity check. All 3 targeted items PASS. No regressions detected.

header_1024_fix.note: At 1024/1152/1279 the mobile hamburger is shown (as intended); at 1280+ desktop nav appears without clipping Get Quote CTA. Note: 'header-get-quote-btn' remains visible in top bar from sm:640px+ across ALL breakpoints (className='hidden sm:inline-flex'), which is intentional design — it lives alongside the hamburger between 1024–1279. The important fix (no right-edge overflow) is verified.

footer_website_link.globe_icon: present (previous sibling svg from lucide Globe)

regression.certifications_page_cards: NABL TC-17291, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, Factory Licence, CGWA — all CONFIRMED present
regression.admin_login: 200 OK, redirects to /admin/dashboard, nn_admin_token stored in localStorage, dashboard loads with 12 enquiries + 2 vendors

critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx: `header-get-quote-btn` uses className 'hidden sm:inline-flex' — this means the desktop Get Quote button remains visible in the top bar between 640px and 1279px (alongside the hamburger). The review-request expectation stated 'should be inside the mobile menu' at 1024px, but the implementation keeps BOTH the top-bar Get Quote AND a mobile-menu-internal `mobile-get-quote-btn`. This is not a bug — it's a valid UX choice (the CTA is not clipped) — but flagging for awareness in case product intent was to hide the top-bar CTA below xl.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration only verified 3 targeted fixes + light regression. Full multi-page UAT was done in iteration_3. All fixes from iteration_3 action items are verified applied and working. If further changes are needed, next agent should re-run only affected areas.
